acceptanceCriteria.AC1: PASS - /render/:formId route is implemented and reachable.
acceptanceCriteria.AC2: PASS - Renderer requests GET /api/forms/:formId/schema and loads published schema.
acceptanceCriteria.AC3: PASS - Field type mapping matches contract (text, textarea, date, number+inputmode=numeric, radio, checkbox, select).
acceptanceCriteria.AC4: PASS - Form title is rendered as GOV.UK-styled <h1>.
acceptanceCriteria.AC5: PASS - Rendered controls have visible labels and label/control associations (htmlFor/id or grouped fieldset/legend).
acceptanceCriteria.AC6: PASS - Required fields show '(required)' hint and client-side required validation is applied.
acceptanceCriteria.AC7: PASS - Missing required fields show GOV.UK error summary with links plus inline field errors.
acceptanceCriteria.AC8: FAIL - Error summary links do not move focus for radio/checkbox errors; focus remains on the clicked summary link.
acceptanceCriteria.AC9: PASS - Successful submit posts JSON to /api/forms/:formId/submit (verified via network/audit log).
acceptanceCriteria.AC10: PASS - Confirmation view uses GOV.UK confirmation panel with reference number and 'Form submitted'.
acceptanceCriteria.AC11: PASS - Keyboard interaction works across native form controls and submit flow; no keyboard trap observed.
acceptanceCriteria.AC12: PASS - GOV.UK page structure present: header, Beta phase banner, main content, footer.
acceptanceCriteria.AC13: PASS - 404 schema fetch shows GOV.UK-styled error state with clear message.

bugs.title: Error summary focus fails for grouped fields (radio/checkbox)
bugs.steps: Open /render/<publishedFormId>, submit empty form to trigger validation, click 'Enter preferred contact' or 'Select at least one option for "Topics of interest"' in error summary.
bugs.expected: Focus should move to the relevant interactive field/group per WCAG 2.4.3.
bugs.actual: Focus stays on the clicked error-summary link; grouped field is not focused.

bugs.title: Backend automated test suite fails in environment
bugs.expected: All backend tests execute and pass.
bugs.actual: Jest run fails with missing module error: cannot find caniuse-lite/dist/unpacker/agents.
